task_completion.description: Verify the project name and identifier are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Redmine 'New project' form. The 'Name' field should contain 'Electrical Interconnection' and the 'Identifier' field should contain 'electrical-interconnection'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project description is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Description' text area in the form. It should contain text mentioning 'interconnection', 'utility', 'compliance', and 'commissioning'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project privacy and homepage settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Public' checkbox to be unchecked (empty) and the 'Homepage' text field to be completely blank.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct modules are enabled and disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Modules' section of the form. Checkboxes for 'Issue tracking', 'Time tracking', 'Gantt chart', 'Calendar', and 'Wiki' must be checked. Checkboxes for 'News', 'Documents', 'Files', 'Repository', and 'Forums' (or 'Boards') must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct trackers are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Trackers' section of the form. Checkboxes for 'Bug', 'Feature', and 'Support' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the subproject was successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., a green banner saying 'Successful creation.') or the settings/overview page of the newly created 'Electrical Interconnection' project.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Firefox web browser to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Firefox browser interface with Redmine loaded, not a terminal window executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the form elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of the form being filled out (typing text, checking/unchecking boxes) rather than jumping straight to a completed state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be interacting directly with the Redmine web application, not typing the project details into a separate text editor or notepad application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project Name: 'Electrical Interconnection'. Target Identifier: 'electrical-interconnection'. Description must contain keywords: 'interconnection', 'utility', 'compliance', 'commissioning'. Privacy: Must be private (Public checkbox unchecked). Required Modules (must be checked): Issue tracking, Time tracking, Gantt chart, Calendar, Wiki. Forbidden Modules (must be unchecked): News, Documents, Files, Repository, Forums/Boards.
